heading: Administration of Fort Donelson National Battlefield
label: 428p–2 Administration of Fort Donelson National Battlefield
text: The Secretary of the Interior shall administer the Fort Donelson National Battlefield in accordance with sections 428p to 428p–2 of this title and the laws generally applicable to units of the National Park System, including the Act of (commonly known as the National Park Service Organic Act; et seq.), and the Act of (commonly known as the Historic Sites, Buildings, and Antiquities Act; et seq.).August 25, 1916August 21, 193516 U.S.C. 1116 U.S.C. 4611See References in Text note below.1

For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 2004 Amendment note set out under and Tables.Pub.
